content: Hopefully this is a good place for requests (couldn't find it elsewhere)! Would it be possible to add an "About" section to each user profile (it's in the Organization settings).Given we have so many people from all over the world, it would make learning about people easier!
Yep, I can see it, cheer :slight_smile:
I didn't even know we had profiles on here, guess it makes sense
yeah, you have to do a few clicks to get to it. Maybe Admins could consider adding to the welcome note to mention the about section and profiles in general :thumbs_up:
